theme.en: Capacity Pressure Spreads Across the Chip Stack
theme.zh: 产能压力蔓延至芯片全栈

dek.en: TSMC signals that leading-edge demand will remain difficult to satisfy, while memory pricing and export-control gaps draw sharper scrutiny. Product roadmaps are responding with larger memory pools and tighter CPU-GPU integration.
dek.zh: 台积电释放出先进制程需求仍将长期难以满足的信号，存储器涨价与出口管制漏洞也受到更严格审视。产品路线图则转向更大内存池以及更紧密的CPU-GPU集成。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: AMD Puts Unified Memory Deeper Into Its Product Roadmap
title.zh: AMD将统一内存进一步纳入产品路线图

summary.en: AMD says unified memory architectures will shape future product choices after the Ryzen AI MAX family paired CPU and GPU compute with a shared memory pool. The approach can reduce data movement and let local AI workloads access more memory than a discrete GPU's dedicated VRAM, though AMD has not disclosed a specific follow-on product.
summary.zh: AMD表示，在Ryzen AI MAX系列将CPU、GPU计算与共享内存池结合之后，统一内存架构将影响其未来产品选择。这种设计可减少数据搬移，并让本地AI工作负载使用超过独立GPU专用显存容量的内存，但AMD尚未公布具体的后续产品。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC Weighs Price Increases as Demand Outruns Supply
title.zh: 需求超过供给，台积电考虑涨价

summary.en: TSMC is reportedly struggling to meet rising chip demand and is considering price increases as available capacity remains tight. Sustained pricing power at the leading foundry would raise costs across AI accelerators and other advanced-node products while signaling that customers still lack easy alternatives.
summary.zh: 报道称，随着芯片需求持续上升、可用产能仍然紧张，台积电正考虑提高价格。领先晶圆代工厂若能维持定价权，将推高AI加速器及其他先进制程产品的成本，也说明客户仍缺乏可快速切换的替代方案。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储器

title.en: TSMC Chief Criticizes Memory Suppliers' Price Increases
title.zh: 台积电董事长批评存储器供应商涨价

summary.en: TSMC chief C.C. Wei publicly criticized RAM makers for raising prices and remarked that he envied their position. The comment highlights how memory has become a separate cost and supply constraint even for customers already paying more for leading-edge logic manufacturing.
summary.zh: 台积电董事长魏哲家公开批评RAM厂商涨价，并表示羡慕它们所处的市场位置。这番话凸显出，即使客户已经为先进逻辑制程支付更高费用，存储器仍正成为另一项独立的成本与供应约束。

title.en: V-Color Shows 2 TB DDR5 MRDIMM Kits
title.zh: V-Color展示2 TB DDR5 MRDIMM套装

summary.en: V-Color introduced DDR5 MRDIMM configurations reaching 2 TB and refreshed its OLED-equipped desktop memory line. The new XOT1 modules include AMD EXPO ULL profiles up to 6000 MT/s at CL26, showing vendors are pushing both server-class capacity and latency-tuned enthusiast products.
summary.zh: V-Color推出容量达到2 TB的DDR5 MRDIMM配置，并更新了带OLED显示的桌面内存产品线。新的XOT1模组提供最高6000 MT/s、CL26的AMD EXPO ULL配置，显示厂商正同时推进服务器级容量与面向高性能桌面的低延迟产品。

title.en: CXMT Uses Aggressive RAM Pricing to Press Incumbents
title.zh: 长鑫存储以激进RAM定价施压既有厂商

summary.en: ChangXin Memory Technologies is reportedly making aggressive pricing moves in the RAM market. Lower-priced Chinese DRAM could pressure incumbent margins and broaden domestic supply, but it may also intensify scrutiny of subsidies, market access, and technology restrictions.
summary.zh: 报道称，长鑫存储正在RAM市场采取更激进的定价策略。价格更低的中国DRAM可能压缩既有厂商利润并扩大本土供应，但也可能加剧围绕补贴、市场准入与技术限制的审查。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: ASML's Elon Musk Invitation Triggers Employee Backlash
title.zh: ASML邀请Elon Musk引发员工反弹

summary.en: ASML invited Elon Musk to an internal technology event, prompting objections from some employees. The dispute is not a lithography roadmap change, but it shows the sensitivity around granting influential external executives access to the culture and technical discussion inside Europe's most strategically important chip-equipment company.
summary.zh: ASML邀请Elon Musk参加内部技术活动，引发部分员工反对。这并非光刻路线图变化，但反映出欧洲最具战略重要性的芯片设备公司在向有影响力的外部高管开放内部文化与技术讨论时所面临的敏感性。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: Arm CEO Questions Feasibility of a U.S. AI-CPU Export Ban
title.zh: Arm CEO质疑美国AI CPU出口禁令的可执行性

summary.en: Arm's chief executive says the United States would have difficulty banning exports of AI-oriented CPU technology to China. Arm's licensing model and the broad use of its instruction-set ecosystem make control more complex than restricting shipments of a specific accelerator, underscoring the enforcement challenge for wider technology rules.
summary.zh: Arm首席执行官表示，美国若要禁止面向中国出口AI用途CPU技术，将面临执行困难。Arm的授权模式及其指令集生态的广泛采用，使管制复杂度高于限制某一款加速器出货，也凸显更广泛技术规则的执法难题。

title.en: Warren Presses Trump to Close an Overseas AI-Chip Loophole
title.zh: Warren敦促Trump堵住海外AI芯片漏洞

summary.en: Senator Elizabeth Warren is calling on the Trump administration to close a loophole that she says allows AI chips to reach overseas units of Chinese companies. If converted into policy, the proposal would extend compliance checks beyond direct shipments and force vendors and cloud operators to track corporate ownership more closely.
summary.zh: 美国参议员Elizabeth Warren敦促Trump政府堵住一项漏洞；她称该漏洞允许AI芯片流向中国企业的海外子公司。若转化为政策，合规审查将不再局限于直接出货，芯片供应商与云服务商也需要更严格地追踪企业所有权关系。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
title.zh: 财报与市场

title.en: Marvell Joins the S&P 500 on AI-Infrastructure Momentum
title.zh: AI基础设施动能推动Marvell纳入S&P 500

summary.en: Marvell is being added to the S&P 500 as demand for AI infrastructure raises the chip designer's market profile. Index inclusion can create incremental buying from passive funds, although it does not by itself change Marvell's revenue outlook or execution risks.
summary.zh: 随着AI基础设施需求提升这家芯片设计公司的市场地位，Marvell将被纳入S&P 500。指数纳入可能带来被动基金的增量买盘，但不会直接改变Marvell的收入前景或执行风险。

title.en: China's Memory Makers Prepare Large IPOs
title.zh: 中国存储芯片厂商筹备大型IPO

summary.en: Chinese memory-chip producers are preparing major initial public offerings as they seek capital for capacity and technology expansion. The listings could deepen domestic funding for DRAM and NAND challengers, while prospectuses may give investors a clearer view of subsidies, losses, utilization, and dependence on restricted equipment.
summary.zh: 中国存储芯片厂商正筹备大型首次公开募股，以募集扩产与技术升级所需资金。这些上市计划可能为DRAM和NAND挑战者提供更深的本土融资渠道，同时招股书也可能让投资者更清楚地看到补贴、亏损、产能利用率及对受限设备的依赖。

theme.en: Inference Efficiency Moves Into System Design
theme.zh: 推理效率进入系统级设计

dek.en: This week's strongest papers attack long-context costs through shared routing, programmable sparse attention, and non-uniform KV caches. EDA and GPU work extend the same theme by making inter-die routing and extreme-precision arithmetic more explicit optimization targets.
dek.zh: 本周最值得关注的论文通过共享路由、可编程稀疏注意力与非均匀KV cache降低长上下文成本。EDA与GPU方向也延续了这一主题，将跨裸片布线和超高精度算术变成更明确的优化目标。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: GPU Multi-Precision Integer Division at Extreme Bit Widths
title.zh: 面向超高位宽的GPU多精度整数除法

papers.authors: Martin B. Marchioro, Aske N. Raahauge, Marc I. Løvenskjold, et al.

summary.en: The paper implements integer-domain Newton division on CUDA for precisions from 2^15 to 2^18 bits, a range not supported by CGBN division. Prefix-sum and multiplication refinements bring measured performance close to the authors' operation-count cost model. The result is specialized rather than a general AI kernel, but it is relevant to GPU workloads in cryptography and symbolic computation that exceed standard big-integer libraries.
summary.zh: 该论文在CUDA上实现了全整数域的Newton除法，覆盖2^15至2^18位精度，这一范围不受CGBN除法支持。通过前缀和与多精度乘法优化，实测性能接近作者基于运算次数建立的成本模型。该成果并非通用AI内核，但对超出标准大整数库能力的密码学与符号计算GPU工作负载具有价值。

title.en: AI Research & Inference Systems
title.zh: AI研究与推理系统

title.en: Pretraining Recurrent Networks Without Unrolling Them
title.zh: 无需循环展开的循环网络预训练

summary.en: Supervised Memory Training uses a Transformer encoder to generate one-step memory-transition labels, then trains a nonlinear RNN without backpropagation through time. This creates a time-parallel training path with O(1) gradient length between tokens and outperforms BPTT in the reported language and pixel-sequence experiments. The preprint could make recurrent inference architectures easier to train, but broader model-scale and hardware-efficiency results are still needed.
summary.zh: Supervised Memory Training先用Transformer编码器生成单步记忆状态转移标签，再训练非线性RNN，从而避免时间反向传播。该方法形成可按时间并行的训练路径，使任意token间的梯度路径长度为O(1)，并在论文报告的语言与像素序列实验中优于BPTT。这项预印本可能降低循环推理架构的训练难度，但仍需更大模型规模与硬件效率数据。

title.en: Cross-Layer Sparse Attention Shares One Routing Index
title.zh: 跨层稀疏注意力共享单一路由索引

papers.authors: Yutao Sun, Yanqi Zhang, Li Dong, et al.

summary.en: Cross-Layer Sparse Attention computes token-level top-k routing once and reuses the index across decoder layers in a YOCO-style KV-sharing architecture. Sharing both KV state and routing attacks prefill cost, cache capacity, and decode overhead without falling back to coarse block sparsity. The paper reports quality across short- and long-context benchmarks, but the preprint still needs independent end-to-end serving validation.
summary.zh: Cross-Layer Sparse Attention在YOCO式KV共享架构中只计算一次token级top-k路由，并在多个解码层复用该索引。同时共享KV状态与路由，可共同降低prefill成本、cache容量和解码开销，又无需退回到较粗粒度的块稀疏。论文在短上下文与长上下文基准上报告了质量结果，但仍需独立的端到端服务验证。

title.en: Vortex Turns Sparse-Attention Ideas Into Serving Kernels
title.zh: Vortex将稀疏注意力设计转化为服务内核

papers.authors: Zhuoming Chen, Xinrui Zhong, Qilong Feng, et al.

summary.en: Vortex combines a Python-embedded sparse-attention language with a page-centric tensor abstraction and a backend integrated into LLM serving stacks. Algorithms generated and refined through the system reach up to 3.46x the throughput of full attention while preserving accuracy in the reported tests. The useful contribution is programmability plus deployment, although the best results depend on the paper's benchmark and serving environment.
summary.zh: Vortex将嵌入Python的稀疏注意力描述语言、以页面为中心的张量抽象，以及集成到LLM服务栈的后端结合起来。通过该系统生成并优化的算法，在论文测试中可达到完整注意力最高3.46倍的吞吐量，同时保持准确率。其关键贡献是把可编程性与部署结合，但最佳结果仍依赖论文所用基准和服务环境。

title.en: Agent Memory Gets a Systems-Level Cost Model
title.zh: Agent记忆获得系统级成本模型

papers.authors: Yasmine Omri, Ziyu Gan, Zachary Broveak, et al.

summary.en: This study profiles ten agent-memory systems across two benchmark suites and separates construction, retrieval, and generation costs. Its four-axis taxonomy and ten system recommendations expose how designs move work between read and write paths, including scheduling, freshness, and amortization tradeoffs. The characterization is useful for storage-tier and fleet planning, but conclusions may shift as agent workloads and memory implementations mature.
summary.zh: 该研究在两套基准上分析了10种Agent记忆系统，并将构建、检索与生成成本分别归因。其四维分类法与10项系统建议揭示了不同设计如何在读写路径之间转移工作，包括调度、新鲜度与成本摊销权衡。这些结果有助于存储分层与集群规划，但随着Agent负载和记忆实现演进，结论仍可能变化。

title.en: Tangram Makes Non-Uniform KV Caches Practical
title.zh: Tangram让非均匀KV cache走向实用

papers.authors: Hyungmin Kim, Minsoo Kim, Hongseok Kim, et al.

summary.en: Tangram assigns a deterministic memory budget to each attention head, groups heads with similar retention needs into vectorized page tables, and balances work ahead of time. These choices target the fragmentation, scheduling, and kernel-utilization penalties that have limited non-uniform KV-cache compression in multi-turn serving. The architecture is well matched to GPU memory constraints, though the available abstract does not expose enough end-to-end numbers to judge deployment gains.
summary.zh: Tangram为每个注意力头分配确定性的内存预算，将保留需求相近的头组织进向量化页表，并提前完成负载均衡。这些设计针对多轮服务中限制非均匀KV cache压缩的内存碎片、调度复杂度与内核利用率损失。其架构与GPU内存约束高度相关，但现有摘要缺少足够的端到端数据，尚难判断实际部署收益。

title.en: Quantum Computing
title.zh: 量子计算

title.en: Quantum Discovery of Rare Events Without Prior Labels
title.zh: 无需预先标记的量子稀有事件发现

papers.authors: Naixu Guo, Po-Wei Huang, Qisheng Wang, et al.

summary.en: The proposed quantum algorithm discovers and samples events below a probability threshold without first identifying which outcomes are rare. It achieves optimal quantum scaling with the threshold, including a quadratic speedup for heavy-tailed systems with nonzero tail mass and a polynomial speedup for stationary stochastic processes. The result is algorithmic rather than an experimental hardware demonstration, so practical advantage depends on state preparation and fault-tolerant resources.
summary.zh: 该量子算法无需预先知道哪些结果属于稀有事件，就能发现并采样概率低于阈值的事件。其复杂度随稀有度阈值达到最优量子缩放，对尾部质量非零的重尾系统可获得二次加速，对平稳随机过程则可获得多项式加速。该成果属于算法研究而非实验硬件演示，实际优势仍取决于量子态制备与容错资源。

title.en: EDA & Design Methods
title.zh: EDA与设计方法

title.en: Routing Models for 2.5D and 3D Multi-Die FPGAs
title.zh: 面向2.5D与3D多裸片FPGA的布线模型

papers.authors: Amirhossein Poolad, Soheil Gholami Shahrouz, Andrew Boutros, et al.

summary.en: The authors extend VTR and VPR to model, place, and route a broad range of 2.5D and 3D FPGA inter-die fabrics. Their design-space exploration uses HSPICE models for 7 nm active dies and a 45 nm silicon interposer to quantify how die-crossing technologies affect density and latency. This gives FPGA architects a more realistic open-source path for evaluating stacked designs, but the evidence is simulation-based rather than measured multi-die silicon.
summary.zh: 作者扩展了VTR与VPR，使其能够对多种2.5D和3D FPGA跨裸片互连结构进行建模、布局与布线。设计空间探索采用7 nm有源裸片和45 nm硅中介层的HSPICE模型，量化不同跨裸片技术对密度与延迟的影响。这为FPGA架构师评估堆叠设计提供了更真实的开源路径，但证据来自仿真而非多裸片实测硅片。
